features.name: $size() function call on 1D bit vector
features.description: Code should include a $size() function call applied to a 1D bit vector to yield its width

features.name: $size() function call on memory
features.description: Code should include a $size() function call applied to a memory to yield the memory width

features.name: $bits() function call on memory
features.description: Code should include a $bits() function call applied to a memory to yield the total bit count (width times depth)

features.name: $bits() function call on struct
features.description: Code should include a $bits() function call applied to a struct to yield the total bit count of all members
features.snippet:
typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] a; logic [3:0] b; } my_struct_t;
int struct_bits = $bits(my_struct_t);
